title: B.Sc. (Hons) Forensic Science with specialization in Forensic Biology and Serology
content: The B.Sc. (Hons) Forensic Science program with a specialization in Forensic Biology and Serology is an undergraduate course that provides an in-depth understanding of the biological and serological aspects of forensic science. This program aims to equip students with the theoretical knowledge and practical skills necessary to analyze biological evidence and body fluids in a forensic context, preparing them for careers in forensic laboratories, law enforcement, and research institutions. The curriculum combines foundational courses in forensic science with specialized courses in forensic biology and serology, complemented by practical training, laboratory work, internships, and field experiences. XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) in Forensic Science Ist yr. with minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. 01 Build a strong foundation in forensic science with a focus on biological and serological techniques used in crime scene investigation and evidence analysis. 02 Develop practical skills in the collection, preservation, and examination of biological evidence such as blood, hair, tissues, and bodily fluids. 03 Train students in advanced laboratory methods including DNA analysis, blood typing, and serological testing for accurate identification and profiling. 04 Cultivate critical thinking and ethical awareness for applying forensic biological data in legal and investigative settings. 05 Promote research and innovation in forensic biology and serology to address emerging challenges in forensic investigations. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 02 03 01 02 03 Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) in Forensic Science Ist yr. with minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
